description: A senior data analyst who knows SQL and BigQuery. Asks precise, technical questions with specific table and column names.

parts.text: Run a z-score anomaly check on the sale_price column in order_items with threshold 2.5

turns.reference: Z-score anomaly detection on order_items.sale_price with threshold 2.5.

parts.text: Show me total revenue and order count grouped by country, joining orders to users, only completed orders

turns.reference: Revenue and order count by country from orders JOIN users WHERE status='Complete'.

parts.text: Give me week-over-week revenue for the past 8 weeks with percentage change

turns.reference: Weekly revenue trend for 8 weeks with week-over-week delta.
